perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the person contemplating whether to share the documentary on social media, weighing the importance of raising awareness against the potential upset it may cause to their followers.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is a follower who may be upset or offended by the documentary's content, feeling distressed by the graphic portrayal of animal cruelty.
The THIRD_PARTY represents the animals depicted in the documentary, who are suffering from cruelty in farming practices and are indirectly affected by the decision to share the documentary.
